ABUZ8 OS Pro · v1.0
✧ Welcome to ABUZ8 OS
This is a local AI desktop agent for regular people: it opens with its own front end, local tool server, memory, mission board, MCP bridge, and bundled LFM2 2.6B Pro CPU brain. No home server is required.
🧠
Bundled brain

The Pro build carries the 2.6B GGUF model and llama.cpp runtime inside the app package.

🖥️
Agent tools

After you allow actions, it can open apps, open web pages, capture screenshots, write sandboxed files, and run safe system probes.

🔒
Your machine

Memory, missions, connectors, downloaded models, and settings live in the portable data folder.

Step 1 · Brains
Your brain shelf
The bundled 2.6B brain starts locally. You can also add user-approved GGUF files or register your own cloud model endpoints later.
Detecting engines…
Step 2 · Capabilities
This machine, specifically
ABUZ8 OS probes the device it is running on and shows what is live, what is fallback, and what needs a connector.
Scanning this device…
Step 3 · Layout
What is inside
The app is organized around the daily work loop:
🌌
HUD

Cinematic widget desktop — boss avatar, mission hero, brain monitor, CRM.

💬
CHAT

3-column Claude-desktop. Thread + artifacts + sources/memory/tools rail.

📊
WORK

Mission Control. KPIs + portfolio of every product/asset you own.

🧭
REF

Reference panel. Agentic framework comparison, your sovereign edge.

Step 4 · Try it
Take it for a spin
Pick one. Desktop and web actions require the session Allow actions switch so the app cannot operate the computer silently.
You're set
Ready ✦
Type in the command bar or chat. Press Ctrl+K from anywhere. Re-open this guide with the ? in the topbar.
💬
Plain language

"Open Paint." "Take a screenshot." "Remember my supplier list."

👁️
Watch it work

The Tools rail shows available tools and permission state.

⚡
Extend it

Import MCP connectors, add local GGUF brains, or register cloud brains with your own keys.

A

Sovereign OS Migration · Pull Everything Open
— sources · — items

Every importable skill, tool, MCP server, and API from sovereign sources. Select items → export a single Qadir-ready config JSON · or POST directly to Qadir's /api/mcp/install + /api/skills/import endpoints. Honest status tagging: PUBLIC = open-spec/MIT/Apache · OAUTH = needs your token · PAID = paid API key.

🛡 Authorized use only. These tools are for testing infrastructure you own or have explicit written authorization to test. Using them against systems you do not own or are not authorized to test is illegal in most jurisdictions (CFAA in the US, similar laws elsewhere). Catalog provided for legitimate sovereign security ops on your own ABUZ8 stack.
Imports local connector definitions and installs ABUZ8 OS back into Claude Desktop as an MCP symbiote.
Local Model Shelf · Hugging Face + CLI Bridges
Downloads are stored under the ABUZ8 data folder. CLI connectors are saved locally and only run when explicitly allowed.
0 items selected
Manus Skill · Import from GitHub URL

Pick a target device for deployment readiness check + setup steps.

Sovereign OS · Bismillah
checking…

Avatar Studio · Clone Wizard

1Voice
2Face
3Identity
4Train
Record 60s of your voice
Read this passage clearly. The system extracts your timbre, pitch range, prosody, and resonant frequencies. Stored locally · never uploaded without consent.
"This is my local voice sample for ABUZ8 OS. I consent to storing this sample on this computer for local testing. The numbers count: one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten."
00:00 / 01:00
Upload 5 photos
Front · 3/4 left · 3/4 right · profile · smile. Diffuse lighting. No glasses unless they're your daily look.
Identity
Name your clone and pick how it presents.
Train clone
Submits voice + photos + identity to the local avatar queue. If a GPU renderer is connected, it can render a clone; otherwise this build uses browser TTS and preview fallbacks.
Queued…

Connect

Enter your credentials. We test the connection, store it locally (never sent to a server), and light up the green dot.
If set, every chat message + AI response from this brain also posts to this Telegram chat in real-time.
